title: 10 minutes http client timeout is too low when image generation is done on CPU
summary:
### What is the issue?

[This line](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/x/imagegen/server.go#L58) sets the 10 minute timeout regardless of the hardware.

This is maybe fine on a GPU, but is certainly too low for a CPU.
The timeout should be at least an hour or more when CPU is used.

title: Stale stream timeout does not trigger fallback_providers chain
summary:
### Problem

When the primary provider becomes unresponsive during streaming (no chunks delivered within the stale timeout), Hermes kills the connection and retries with the **same** provider. It does **not** activate the `fallback_providers` chain.

This means that if a provider is alive but unresp

title: [PR] fix: default Ollama think:true so reasoning traces stop leaking into drafts
summary:
## Summary

Switch the default of the Ollama `think` parameter from `false` to `true` in `callOllamaNative`. This stops reasoning-trained models from dumping their chain-of-thought into the email body (and silently breaking JSON-output features).

Routing any feature (Email Analysis, Draft G

title: [PR] fix: Ollama memory leaks and model not unloaded on workspace teardown

## Description

Ollama models stay loaded in RAM after agent workspaces are stopped or deleted, and streaming resources are not properly released on abort or error.

This PR fixes stream lifecycle cleanup across the chat pipeline (reader cancellation, abort signal propagation, IPC transport canc

title: [PR] feat: clientful architecture — offline-first, lazy cloud, IndexedDB storage
summary:
Restructures the app to follow clientful principles: zero mandatory server dependencies, user-owned data, offline-first by default. Cloud features (Google Drive, AI) become opt-in extensions that load lazily.

## Service worker caches all CDN assets

- Added Font Awesome CSS and bwip-js to `ASSETS`

title: [PR] move from ollama to google gemini api key
summary:
### Summary of Changes

Migrates the Marine AI platform's chatbot service from local Ollama/HuggingFace to the cloud-based **Google Gemini API**. This improves SQL generation accuracy and saves substantial local hardware resources (CPU/GPU/RAM) by removing the local model inference overhead.

--
